articles.title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat

articles.title: commaai/openpilot
articles.excerpt: openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.

articles.title: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
articles.excerpt: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built for Claude Code / Codex. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.

articles.title: Robbyant/lingbot-map
articles.excerpt: A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data

articles.title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp

articles.summary: Codebase Memory MCP 是一个高性能代码智能服务，将代码库索引为持久化知识图谱，支持 158 种语言，可毫秒级查询，token 消耗减少 99%。适合大型项目快速检索和理解，单静态二进制部署。

articles.title: cupy/cupy

articles.title: opendatalab/MinerU

articles.summary: 提出HAT-4D，通过人机协作从单目视频中提取多物体4D交互。解决了现有方法在严重遮挡和复杂动态下的失效问题，为具身AI和VLA训练提供高效数据采集路径。

articles.title: PhysisForcing: Physics Reinforced World Simulator for Robotic Manipulation
articles.excerpt: Video generation models have emerged as a promising paradigm for embodied world simulation. However, both general-domain video generators and robot-specific data fine-tuned models can still produce physically implausible manipulations, including discontinuous motion trajectories and inconsistent robot-object interactions, which limits their reliability as world simulators. articles.summary: 提出PhysisForcing，一种物理增强的世界模拟器，针对机器人操作。解决视频生成模型中常见的物理不合规问题（如不连续运动轨迹），增强模拟可靠性。

articles.title: Reflect-R1: Evidence-Driven Reflection for Self-Correction in Long Video Understanding
articles.excerpt: Current multimodal reflection mechanisms for long video understanding predominantly rely on closed-loop self-reflection within internal parameters. articles.summary: 提出Reflect-R1，一种基于证据驱动的反思机制，用于长视频理解中的自我纠错。通过引入外部客观证据克服盲信问题，并解决多阶段强化学习中的策略耦合。

articles.title: NormGuard: Reward-Preserving Norm Constraints in Flow-Matching Reinforcement Learning

articles.summary: 提出NormGuard，在流匹配强化学习中施加奖励保持的范数约束。发现RL微调会导致速度范数膨胀5%-15%，该方法在提升奖励对齐的同时保持感知质量。

articles.title: Qwen-Image-2.0-RL Technical Report

articles.summary: 报告Qwen-Image-2.0-RL，采用RLHF和在线策略蒸馏优化扩散模型的视觉质量与指令跟随能力。构建任务特定复合奖励模型以提供可靠信号。

articles.title: MemoBench: Benchmarking World Modeling in Dynamically Changing Environments
articles.excerpt: Video generation models aspire to simulate dynamic environments, and several benchmarks now evaluate memory consistency across frames. However, most assess consistency only while the target remains in view, and the few that force objects out of view evaluate static scenes where nothing changes during occlusion. articles.summary: 提出MemoBench，用于评估动态环境中视频生成模型的世界建模能力。针对现有基准在物体被遮挡时仅测试静态场景的不足，该基准围绕物体消失后的记忆一致性设计。

articles.title: PhysiFormer: Learning to Simulate Mechanics in World Space
articles.excerpt: We present PhysiFormer, a diffusion transformer for physically-plausible 3D object motion. Unlike video world models that operate in view-dependent pixel space, PhysiFormer represents objects as 3D meshes expressed in world coordinates. Given the initial vertex positions and velocities, as well as object material type, rigid or elastic, the model samples future vertex trajectories. While related n
articles.summary: 提出PhysiFormer，一种扩散Transformer，在3D世界空间模拟物理合理的物体运动。以3D网格表示物体，输入初始状态和材质类型，采样未来顶点轨迹，优于像素空间方法。

articles.title: Hallucination in World Models is Predictable and Preventable
articles.excerpt: Modern generative world models render increasingly realistic action-controllable futures, yet they frequently hallucinate: rollouts remain visually fluent while drifting from the ground-truth dynamics. We hypothesize that hallucination concentrates in low-coverage regions of the state-action space, where lightweight data-centric signals can both detect it and guide mitigation. To test this, we int
articles.summary: 发现世界模型中的幻觉集中在状态-动作空间的低覆盖区域，并提出基于数据中心的轻量级信号用于检测和缓解幻觉，无需模型修改。

articles.title: EO-WM: A Physically Informed World Model for Probabilistic Earth Observation Forecasting
articles.excerpt: Earth Observation (EO) forecasting aims to predict future Earth surface dynamics from satellite observations under changing meteorological conditions. In this paper, we view this task as a partially observed, weather-driven world modeling problem, in which weather acts as a conditioning signal, while forecasting remains uncertain due to sparse observations and unobserved land-surface states. articles.summary: 提出Qwen-Image-Agent，一个统一的智能体框架，弥合用户上下文与T2I模型所需生成上下文之间的“上下文鸿沟”，处理不明确或依赖实时知识的请求。

articles.title: Confidence-Aware Tool Orchestration for Robust Video Understanding
articles.excerpt: Video reasoning language models implicitly assume that every input frame is equally reliable. This leads to what we term the Blind Trust Problem: under realistic perturbations such as motion blur, glare, or occlusion, frontier video reasoning models can suffer 15-30%p accuracy drops on real-world embodied benchmarks, while remaining unaware that their visual evidence has been degraded. To address
articles.summary: 提出置信度感知的工具编排方法，解决视频推理模型对输入帧“盲信”问题。在运动模糊等扰动下，准确率可下降15-30%，该方法通过感知劣化并动态调用工具提升鲁棒性。

articles.title: OPID: On-Policy Skill Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Outcome-based reinforcement learning provides a stable optimization backbone for language agents, but its sparse trajectory-level rewards provide little guidance on which intermediate decisions should be reinforced or suppressed. articles.summary: 提出OPID（在线策略技能蒸馏），为语言智能体提供密集令牌级监督，无需外部技能记忆。在结果稀疏的强化学习中，通过在线策略自蒸馏指导中间决策。
